title: Roblox Eating and Drinking Sounds
description:
Replaces the default eating, drinking and burping sounds with sounds from Roblox food gears.

Hope you enjoy!
body:
Replaces the default eating, drinking and burping sounds with sounds from Roblox food gears.
Hope you enjoy!
[Preview here](https://youtu.be/HOCLO60A_6Q)<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/HOCLO60A_6Q" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
